refreshInterval.desc: How often the bar and panel refresh battery power and time text.
refreshInterval.label: Refresh interval

showPowerInBar.desc: Show the current battery charge or discharge rate next to the battery graphic in the bar.
showPowerInBar.label: Show power draw in bar

showTimeInBar.desc: Show the estimated time to empty or full next to the battery graphic in the bar.
showTimeInBar.label: Show remaining time in bar
